article.description: — Giannis Antetokounmpo had 37 points, eight rebounds and seven assists as the Milwaukee Bucks erased a 12-point halftime deficit and beat the New York Knicks 121-111 on Tuesday night.
article.headline: Antetokounmpo scores 37, Rollins adds 25 in Bucks' 121-111 victory over Knicks

images.caption: Giannis Antetokounmpo doesn't get called for what looks to be traveling as he drops in a layup at the rim.
images.name: Giannis appears to get away with a blatant travel

article.linkText: Antetokounmpo scores 37, Rollins adds 25 in Bucks' 121-111 victory over Knicks
article.story: MILWAUKEE -- — Giannis Antetokounmpo had 37 points, eight rebounds and seven assists as the Milwaukee Bucks erased a 12-point halftime deficit and beat the New York Knicks 121-111 on Tuesday night. Milwaukee's Ryan Rollins added a career-high 25 points. New York’s Jalen Brunson scored 36 points but hurt himself midway through the fourth quarter in a play that sparked Milwaukee’s winning rally. Brunson appeared to injure his leg initially while scrambling for a loose ball in the fourth quarter. He remained on the floor but was moving gingerly. Then, he was dribbling behind the 3-point line near Milwaukee’s bench when he fell backward in clear pain and lost the ball. As Brunson continued to sit on the floor, Antetokounmpo got a steal and dunked on the other end to tie the game at 103-all with 6:13 remaining and start an 8-0 run. Brunson stayed in the game after a timeout, but the Knicks couldn’t slow Milwaukee’s momentum. Antetokounmpo put Milwaukee ahead for good by converting a running layup with 5:31 left. Mikal Bridges had 24 points for New York. Milwaukee, which trailed 71-59 at halftime, snapped New York’s five-game winning streak in this series. Milwaukee had won nine straight from the Knicks immediately before this stretch, which began on Christmas Day of 2023. The Bucks were coming off a 118-113 loss at Cleveland in which they were missing Kevin Porter Jr. (sprained left ankle), Kyle Kuzma (sprained left ankle) and Cole Anthony (illness). Anthony and Kuzma returned to action Tuesday, but Porter missed a third straight game. Bucks coach Doc Rivers said before the game that Porter's “going to be out a bit” and that it's too early to tell when the guard might return. “We're not going to rush him because we don't want this to become chronic,” Rivers said. “It was a bad turn, so we just want to be patient.” New York remained without Mitchell Robinson, who hasn't played yet this season as the Knicks continue to monitor his injured left ankle. Up Next Knicks: At the Chicago Bulls on Friday Bucks: Host the Golden State Warriors on Thursday. ------ AP NBA: https://apnews.com/hub/NBA

images.name: LeBron James  [1296x729]

images.alt: Victor Wembanyama #1 of the San Antonio Spurs handles the ball during the game against the Detroit Pistons on March 5, 2026 at the Frost Bank Center in San Antonio, Texas.
images.caption: Victor Wembanyama and the Spurs continue to see their championship odds shift.
images.name: Victor Wembanyama [1296x729]

images.alt: Jayson Tatum #0 of the Boston Celtics celebrates after scoring against the Dallas Mavericks during the second quarter at TD Garden on March 06, 2026 in Boston, Massachusetts.
images.caption: The Celtics' title odds have shortened since Jayson Tatum's return last week.
images.name: Jayson Tatum [1296x729]

images.alt: Victor Wembanyama #1 and Devin Vassell #24 of the San Antonio Spurs looks on during the game against the New Orleans Pelicans on January 25, 2026 at the Frost Bank Center in San Antonio, Texas.
images.caption: Led by Victor Wembanyama, the Spurs continue to see their NBA championship odds shorten.

images.alt: Oklahoma City Thunder guard Shai Gilgeous-Alexander (2) against the Phoenix Suns in the first half at Mortgage Matchup Center.
images.caption: Even after a rough stretch of games, the Thunder remain the heavy favorites to win the NBA championship.
images.name: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander [1296x729]

images.alt: Cleveland Cavaliers guard Donovan Mitchell (45) against the Phoenix Suns in the first half at Mortgage Matchup Center.
images.caption: Adding James Harden to a talented roster with the likes of Donovan Mitchell gives the Cavs a higher upside this season.
images.name: Donovan Mitchell [1296x729]

images.alt: Jaylen Brown #7 of the Boston Celtics shoots against the Portland Trail Blazers at TD Garden on January 26, 2026 in Boston, Massachusetts.
images.caption: The Celtics now have shorter odds to win the NBA title than the Spurs, Rockets, Knicks and Pistons.

images.alt: Jamal Murray #27 of the Denver Nuggets dribbles the ball during the game against the Dallas Mavericks on January 14, 2026 at American Airlines Center in Dallas, Texas.

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (New York Knicks vs. Milwaukee Bucks: Game Highlights) 2025/10/29 ESHEET

videos.description: Jalen Brunson gets to the rack and drops in an and-1 for the Knicks.
videos.headline: Brunson rattles in and-1 for the Knicks

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Brunson rattles in and-1 for the Knicks) 2025/10/29 ESHEET

videos.description: Giannis Antetokounmpo flies to the rack and banks in a tough jumper while falling to the floor.
videos.headline: Giannis banks in shot falling to the floor

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Giannis banks in shot falling to the floor) 2025/10/29 ESHEET

videos.description: Jalen Brunson drops in a slick floater to keep the Knicks rolling in the first half.
videos.headline: Brunson floats one in for the Knicks

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Brunson floats one in for the Knicks) 2025/10/29 ESHEET

videos.description: Karl-Anthony Towns tries to drop in a layup, but Myles Turner swats it away from behind.
videos.headline: Myles Turner denies KAT at the rim

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Myles Turner denies KAT at the rim) 2025/10/29 ESHEET

videos.description: Giannis Antetokounmpo spins by a defender to drop in an and-1 for the Bucks.
videos.headline: Giannis smoothly spins his way in for an and-1

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Giannis smoothly spins his way in for an and-1) 2025/10/29 ESHEET

videos.description: Jalen Brunson knocks down a short jumper while drawing contact for the Knicks.
videos.headline: Jalen Brunson cashes in on an and-1

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Jalen Brunson cashes in on an and-1) 2025/10/29 ESHEET

videos.description: Mikal Bridges sprints toward the basket and drops in a tough and-1 for the Knicks.
videos.headline: Mikal Bridges speeds in for a Knicks and-1

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Mikal Bridges speeds in for a Knicks and-1) 2025/10/29 ESHEET

videos.description: Giannis Antetokounmpo drives to the basket and throws down a fierce jam to seal the Bucks' win over the Knicks.
videos.headline: Giannis mean-mugs after dunk seals Bucks' win

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Giannis mean-mugs after dunk seals Bucks' win) 2025/10/29 ESHEET
